name: Pizza Margherita
description: A classic Neapolitan pizza with San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella, fragrant basil leaves, and a drizzle of olive oil on a thin, beautifully charred crust.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Tender marinated chicken simmered in a rich, velvety tomato-based sauce with butter, cream, and a warm blend of garam masala, fenugreek, and a touch of honey.

name: Fish Tacos
description: Crispy beer-battered or grilled white fish nestled in warm corn tortillas, topped with crunchy cabbage slaw, tangy lime crema, and a squeeze of fresh lime.

name: Tonkotsu Ramen
description: A deeply flavourful pork bone broth simmered for hours until creamy and rich, served with springy noodles, soft-boiled egg, chashu pork, and nori.

name: Grilled Salmon
description: A perfectly seared salmon fillet with a golden, slightly crispy skin and a tender, flaky interior, seasoned simply with lemon, herbs, and a hint of garlic.

name: Falafel Wrap
description: Golden-crisp chickpea fritters tucked into warm pita bread with fresh vegetables, creamy tahini sauce, and pickled turnips for a satisfying plant-based meal.

name: Pad Thai
description: Wok-tossed rice noodles in a sweet-sour tamarind sauce with prawns or tofu, bean sprouts, crushed peanuts, and a squeeze of lime, all kissed by high heat.

name: Pasta Carbonara
description: Silky al dente spaghetti coated in a luscious emulsion of egg yolks, Pecorino Romano, and crispy guanciale, finished with a generous crack of black pepper.

name: Sushi Platter
description: An artful arrangement of fresh nigiri, maki rolls, and sashimi featuring the finest seasonal fish, served with pickled ginger, wasabi, and soy sauce.

name: Chicken Tikka Masala
description: Chunks of tandoori-spiced chicken bathed in a creamy, mildly spiced tomato and yogurt sauce with aromatic cumin, coriander, and a swirl of fresh cream.

name: BBQ Ribs
description: Fall-off-the-bone tender pork ribs slow-smoked for hours, glazed with a sticky-sweet barbecue sauce that caramelises into irresistible charred edges.

name: Bibimbap
description: A vibrant bowl of warm rice topped with an array of seasoned vegetables, gochujang chilli paste, a fried egg, and optional bulgogi beef, mixed together before eating.

name: Beef Burger
description: A juicy, flame-grilled beef patty stacked with melted cheese, crisp lettuce, ripe tomato, and special sauce, all held together by a toasted brioche bun.

name: Chicken Shawarma
description: Thinly shaved layers of marinated chicken, slow-roasted on a vertical spit until golden and crispy-edged, served with garlic sauce, pickles, and warm flatbread.

name: Pho
description: A fragrant, star anise and cinnamon-infused beef broth ladled over silky rice noodles and paper-thin slices of beef, garnished with fresh herbs, bean sprouts, and lime.

name: Steak
description: A premium cut of beef seared to a perfect crust on the outside and a blushing pink centre, rested and finished with a knob of herb butter and flaky sea salt.

name: Tacos al Pastor
description: Spit-roasted pork marinated in a smoky dried chilli and pineapple adobo, carved onto small corn tortillas with diced onion, cilantro, and a wedge of grilled pineapple.

name: Chicken Biryani
description: Fragrant basmati rice layered with spiced chicken, caramelised onions, and saffron-infused milk, slow-cooked under a sealed lid to let the flavours mingle beautifully.

name: Moussaka
description: A hearty Greek casserole of silky roasted eggplant, seasoned lamb mince in tomato sauce, and a golden, bubbling layer of creamy béchamel on top.

name: Dim Sum
description: An assortment of bite-sized steamed and fried dumplings, buns, and pastries served in bamboo baskets, perfect for sharing over tea in the Cantonese tradition.

name: Lamb Chops
description: Succulent, herb-crusted lamb cutlets seared in a hot pan until beautifully caramelised outside and rosy pink within, finished with a rosemary and garlic jus.

name: Enchiladas
description: Soft corn tortillas rolled around a savoury filling of chicken, cheese, or beef, smothered in a vibrant chilli sauce and baked until bubbly with melted cheese on top.

name: Bell Pepper Curry
description: Vibrant bell peppers simmered in a fragrant onion-tomato gravy seasoned with cumin, coriander, and turmeric. This everyday North Indian sabzi brings a gentle sweetness from the peppers that balances beautifully with the warm spices.

name: Bhindi Masala
description: Tender okra stir-fried with onions, tomatoes, and a bold blend of coriander, cumin, and amchur until perfectly crisp-tender. This beloved dry sabzi is a staple across Indian households, prized for its earthy flavor and satisfying texture.

name: Eggplant Methi
description: Soft eggplant pieces cooked with fresh fenugreek leaves, garlic, and a warming spice blend of mustard seeds, cumin, and red chili. The slight bitterness of the methi leaves complements the creamy eggplant for a deeply satisfying vegetable dish.

name: Kadhi
description: A tangy and comforting yogurt-based curry thickened with besan and tempered with mustard seeds, curry leaves, and dried red chilies. Often studded with crispy pakoras, this home-style dish is the quintessential comfort food paired with steamed rice.

name: Marathi Moong Curry
description: A wholesome Maharashtrian preparation of whole green moong beans cooked in a coconut and peanut-based masala with aromatic curry leaves and mustard seeds. This protein-rich curry is a staple in Marathi households, offering a hearty and nutritious everyday meal.

name: Masoor Dal
description: Pink-red lentils simmered until meltingly soft and finished with a sizzling tadka of ghee, cumin, garlic, and whole dried chilies. This everyday dal is beloved for its simplicity, quick cooking time, and deeply satisfying, earthy flavor.

name: Mattar Paneer
description: Cubes of soft paneer and sweet green peas simmered in a luscious tomato-onion gravy spiced with garam masala, turmeric, and kasuri methi. This iconic North Indian curry is a vegetarian crowd-pleaser found on restaurant menus and home tables alike.

name: Mixed Veg + Paneer
description: A colorful medley of seasonal vegetables and golden paneer cubes tossed in a fragrant masala of ginger, garlic, and warming spices. This versatile dry sabzi is a nutritious one-pot dish that showcases whatever fresh produce is in season.

name: Mumbai Pav Bhaji
description: A beloved Mumbai street food featuring a thick, buttery mash of mixed vegetables cooked with a special pav bhaji masala and heaps of butter, served sizzling hot alongside toasted, buttered pav rolls. The generous squeeze of lemon and raw onion garnish are essential to the experience.

name: Mushroom Masala
description: Meaty button mushrooms cooked in a rich onion-tomato gravy with ginger, garlic, and a blend of garam masala and kasuri methi. The mushrooms soak up the aromatic sauce beautifully, making this a favorite vegetarian curry for both everyday meals and special occasions.

name: Sambar
description: A tangy and aromatic South Indian lentil stew made with toor dal, tamarind, seasonal vegetables, and a freshly ground sambar powder of coriander, fenugreek, and dried chilies. Finished with a crackling tempering of mustard seeds, curry leaves, and asafoetida, it is the cornerstone of any South Indian meal.

name: Tandoori Vegetables
description: An assortment of vegetables such as paneer, bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms marinated in a vibrant tandoori yogurt spice paste and charred in high heat until smoky and caramelized. These smoky, slightly charred bites capture the essence of tandoor cooking in a vegetarian form.

name: Tofu Bhurji
description: Crumbled tofu scrambled with onions, tomatoes, green chilies, and turmeric in the style of classic Indian paneer bhurji. This protein-packed plant-based dish comes together in minutes and delivers bold, satisfying flavor with every bite.

name: Teriyaki Salmon
description: Thick salmon fillets glazed with a sweet-savory teriyaki sauce of soy, mirin, and sake, grilled until caramelized and flaky.

name: Chicken Katsu
description: A crispy panko-breaded chicken cutlet deep-fried to a golden crunch, served with tangy tonkatsu sauce and shredded cabbage.

name: Gyudon (Beef Bowl)
description: Thin-sliced beef and sweet onions simmered in a dashi-soy-mirin broth, served over a steaming bowl of rice with a soft-cooked egg.

name: Yakitori
description: Bite-sized chicken pieces skewered on bamboo sticks and grilled over binchōtan charcoal, brushed with tare sauce or simply salted.

name: Miso-Glazed Black Cod
description: Buttery black cod marinated in sweet white miso for days, then broiled until caramelized and flaking apart.

name: Tempura Udon
description: Thick, chewy wheat noodles served in a steaming dashi broth topped with crispy shrimp and vegetable tempura.

name: Kimchi Jjigae
description: A fiery, deeply savory stew of aged kimchi, pork belly, tofu, and scallions, bubbling in an earthenware pot.

name: Bulgogi
description: Paper-thin beef slices marinated in a sweet soy-pear sauce with garlic, sesame, and scallions, grilled over an open flame.

name: Soondubu Jjigae (Soft Tofu Stew)
description: A spicy, silky stew of uncurdled soft tofu, seafood, vegetables, and a cracked egg in a bubbling gochugaru broth.

name: Japchae (Glass Noodle Stir-Fry)
description: Glassy sweet potato noodles stir-fried with colorful julienned vegetables, beef, and a sweet soy-sesame sauce — a Korean celebration dish.

name: Dakgalbi (Spicy Chicken Stir-Fry)
description: Chunky chicken thighs stir-fried on a massive hot plate with cabbage, sweet potato, rice cakes, and a fiery gochujang sauce.

name: Thai Green Curry
description: A fragrant coconut milk curry simmered with green curry paste, Thai eggplant, bamboo shoots, basil, and tender chicken.

name: Massaman Curry
description: A rich, mild Thai curry with warm spices — cinnamon, cardamom, star anise — slow-simmered with potatoes, peanuts, and beef.

name: Tom Kha Gai
description: A creamy coconut milk soup perfumed with galangal, lemongrass, kaffir lime, mushrooms, and tender chicken.

name: Khao Pad (Thai Fried Rice)
description: Jasmine rice wok-fried with egg, garlic, onion, and a splash of fish sauce, served with a wedge of lime and sliced cucumber.

name: Pad Kra Pao (Thai Basil Chicken)
description: Minced chicken stir-fried with holy basil, garlic, chili, and soy-oyster sauce, served over rice with a crispy fried egg on top.

name: Kung Pao Chicken
description: Crispy diced chicken wok-tossed with peanuts, dried chilies, and Sichuan peppercorns in a tangy-sweet soy-vinegar sauce.

name: Char Siu (BBQ Pork)
description: Pork shoulder lacquered in a sweet-savory glaze of hoisin, honey, five-spice, and red fermented tofu, then roasted until charred at the edges.

name: Mapo Tofu (Sichuan)
description: Silken tofu swimming in a fiery, numbing sauce of doubanjiang, Sichuan peppercorns, and minced pork — Chengdu's signature dish.

name: Cantonese Steamed Fish
description: A whole white fish delicately steamed with ginger and scallion, finished with a sizzle of hot oil and light soy sauce.

name: Wonton Noodle Soup
description: Thin egg noodles in a clear, savory broth with plump shrimp-and-pork wontons, choy sum, and a scattering of fried shallots.

name: Bún Bò Huế
description: A fiery, lemongrass-perfumed beef noodle soup from Huế with thick round noodles, beef shank, pork knuckle, and chili oil.

name: Cơm Tấm (Broken Rice)
description: Saigon's signature broken rice plate with a caramelized grilled pork chop, a fried egg, shredded pork skin, and pickled vegetables.

name: Bánh Xèo (Vietnamese Crêpe)
description: A crispy, turmeric-yellow rice flour crêpe stuffed with shrimp, pork, bean sprouts, and herbs — wrapped in lettuce to eat.

name: Cá Kho Tộ (Caramelized Fish)
description: Catfish fillets braised in a clay pot with a rich caramel sauce of fish sauce, sugar, black pepper, and shallots.

name: Chicken Adobo
description: Chicken braised in a bold sauce of vinegar, soy sauce, garlic, bay leaves, and black peppercorns — the Philippines' national dish.

name: Sinigang na Baboy
description: A sour, savory pork soup made with tamarind broth, loaded with bok choy, radish, eggplant, string beans, and taro.

name: Kare-Kare
description: A rich, nutty peanut-based stew with oxtail, tripe, bok choy, and eggplant, served with fermented shrimp paste on the side.

name: Chicken Tinola with Chayote and Zucchini
aliases: chicken tinola with chayote and zucchini
description: A light, ginger-forward chicken soup with chayote, zucchini, green papaya wedges, malunggay leaves, and fish sauce — Filipino comfort at its purest.

name: Bistek Tagalog
description: Thin-sliced beef marinated in soy sauce and calamansi juice, pan-fried until tender and topped with caramelized onion rings.

name: Eggplant Adobo
description: Tender eggplant braised in a rich soy-vinegar sauce with garlic and bay leaves — a hearty vegetarian twist on the Filipino classic.

name: Tortang Talong with Ground Chicken and Sautéed Vegetables
description: Flame-roasted eggplant flattened and pan-fried with seasoned ground chicken and sautéed vegetables in a golden egg batter — a protein-rich Filipino comfort dish.

name: Open Lumpia Bowl
description: All the flavors of classic lumpia — seasoned pork, shredded cabbage, carrots, and garlic — served deconstructed in a bowl with a side of sweet chili dipping sauce.

name: Grilled Pompano
description: Whole pompano stuffed with tomatoes, onions, and calamansi, then grilled over charcoal until smoky and perfectly flaky — a Filipino seafood favorite.

name: Arroz Caldo
description: A fragrant Filipino chicken rice porridge infused with ginger, garlic, and fish sauce, topped with toasted garlic, scallions, and a wedge of calamansi.

name: Open-Face Pandesal Sandwich
description: Soft, pillowy pandesal rolls topped with a choice of corned beef, egg, cheese, or sardines — the beloved Filipino breakfast open-face style.

name: Chia Champorado
description: A healthier take on the classic Filipino chocolate rice porridge, using chia seeds for added fiber and omega-3s, sweetened with coconut sugar and topped with coconut milk.

name: Filipino BBQ Chicken
description: Chicken marinated in a sweet-savory banana ketchup and soy sauce glaze, skewered and grilled until caramelized and smoky — a Filipino street food staple.

name: Veg Pancit
description: Stir-fried rice noodles loaded with julienned vegetables, soy sauce, and calamansi — a plant-forward version of the classic Filipino birthday noodle dish.

name: Filipino Grilled Shrimp
description: Jumbo shrimp marinated in garlic butter, calamansi, and soy sauce, then grilled until pink and slightly charred — served with a spiced vinegar dip.

name: Tocino Rice Bowl
description: Sweet, caramelized cured pork slices served over garlic fried rice with a fried egg and pickled papaya atchara — the classic Filipino tocilog reimagined as a bowl.
